text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

The decoded attachment doesn't give proper file: 

[/usr/ports/NEW] root@build2>file aa 
aa: data 
[/usr/ports/NEW] root@build2>bzcat aa  
bzcat: aa is not a bzip2 file. 
[/usr/ports/NEW] root@build2>gzcat aa 
gzcat: aa: not in gzip format 

Any chance for to recreate the attachment?
